description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Sanitizers that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have three ubuntu-latest jobs: sanitizers, clang-tidy, and benchmarks. The sanitizers job checks out the code, installs ninja, creates a build directory, configures and builds with sanitizers enabled, and runs tests. The clang-tidy job checks out the code, installs ninja and clang-tidy, creates a build directory, configures with clang-tidy, and builds specific targets. The benchmarks job checks out the code, installs ninja, creates a build directory, configures with benchmarks enabled, and builds.
